title: Houkutuslintu
actors: Laila Jokimo, Eino Kaipainen, Eero Leväluoma
plot: Marja is a prostitute who has to run away, when her pimp Jussi robs and kills one of her costumers. She finds a hiding place in a mansion on the country side. Marja falls in love with the master of the mansion, but Jussi finds out...
